title: The Emperors Face the Worst Generation
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Big Mom, Kid, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 as The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.
scene: The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This technique cancels out every sound you make!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What the hell?! my voice will!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What are you doing?! Come help me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Why didn't that make any noise?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Nothing I touch makes a sound!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You'll set off the other bombs!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why did you have to go and say all that?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your time was up, so it didn't affect you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All those brats came flooding in, looking for their chance to shine...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The least you could've done was tell us about the one piece before you croaked!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 38 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
